content.problemStatement: Lately, Chef has been inspired by the "pawri" meme. Therefore, he decided to take a string SSS and change each of its substrings that spells "party" to "pawri". Find the resulting string.
constraints: SSS contains only lowercase English letters
content.inputFormat:
The first line of the input contains a single integer TTT denoting the number of test cases. The description of TTT test cases follows.
The first and only line of each test case contains a single string SSS.
content.outputFormat: For each test case, print a single line containing the string after it is modified by Chef.

sampleTestCases.explanation:
Explanation:
Example case 1: There is no substring "party" in the original string.
Example case 2: The original string has 222 substrings "party".
Example case 3: There is only a single substring "party" in the original string.
